item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Slow play sucks.
Love this image of Fred Couples taking a nap under his visor in t
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Slow play sucks.
Love this image of Fred Couples taking a nap under his visor in the fairway waiting for the group in front to finish at the 1995 World Cup of Golf in China. 1 1 12 956

item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 42min Fishers Island’s spectacular views paired with bold versions of Seth Raynor’s “id
item.description: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 42min Fishers Island’s spectacular views paired with bold versions of Seth Raynor’s “ideal holes” make it one of the most delightful places to play golf in the U.S. 3 2 57 7 mil
